overall.description: Third-person gameplay from the video game Fort Solis, featuring an astronaut character exploring a dimly lit industrial space facility. The character navigates through narrow corridors and workshops, interacts with doors, and uses a wrist-mounted holographic device while atmospheric teal lighting illuminates the metal interiors.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark entry corridor with illuminated facility signage

events.description: transition from title screen to third-person gameplay perspective

agents.ego_description: character stands in narrow corridor facing a bulletin board covered with sticky notes

entered.detail: illuminated text logo reading TERRA FORT SOLIS on dark wall
white board with colorful sticky notes and papers attached
red storage lockers lining the left corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with an illuminated title card for Fort Solis, then transitions to a dimly lit narrow corridor. An astronaut character stands facing a bulletin board covered in sticky notes, with red metal lockers visible along the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance workshop with cluttered workbench and tool storage

events.description: character moves from narrow corridor into workshop area with workbench
character turns slightly to survey the workbench and equipment

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor and entering the workshop, examining tools and equipment on the workbench

entered.detail: cluttered metal workbench with tools, papers, and equipment
wall-mounted yellow plastic organizer bins above the workbench
illuminated desk lamp providing warm light on the work surface

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the corridor into a workshop area featuring a cluttered workbench with yellow wall-mounted storage bins. Warm light from a desk lamp contrasts with the cool ambient lighting as the character surveys the equipment before continuing toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: workshop approach to exit door with security indicator

events.description: character stops at metal door and initiates opening sequence
door opens revealing window with blinds and dark exterior view

agents.ego_description: approaching the metal security door and opening it to look outside

entered.detail: heavy industrial security door with small window panel
red warning light illuminated above the door frame
wall-mounted access panel with card reader and buttons

segments.scene_description: The character moves toward a metal security door marked with a red indicator light. After interacting with the door control panel, the door opens to reveal a window with horizontal blinds overlooking the dark exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: doorway with exterior window and holographic device interaction

events.description: character raises arm to view wrist-mounted holographic device
character navigates wrist device interface displaying facility map and menu options

agents.ego_description: standing at the doorway looking through window blinds, then checking wrist device for navigation and objectives

entered.detail: horizontal window blinds partially open showing dark exterior
futuristic wrist-mounted computer with glowing holographic display

segments.scene_description: Standing at the open doorway, the character looks through the window blinds at the dark exterior. The character then raises their arm to interact with a wrist-mounted holographic device, navigating through a detailed facility map and menu interface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped industrial corridor into a functional workshop and finally toward a window overlooking the dark exterior. It begins with a title card that fades into a dimly lit hallway where an astronaut stands before a bulletin board and red metal lockers. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a cluttered workshop illuminated by the warm glow of a desk lamp and yellow storage bins. The camera then follows the character toward a metal security door, which slides open after an interaction with the control panel to reveal a window with horizontal blinds. Finally, the perspective shifts as the character looks out into the darkness and raises their arm to navigate a detailed holographic map projected from their wrist.
